Registry / Terms / initial verification of a measuring instrument

initial verification of a measuring instrument

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #00167 · 2 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #2.15view ↗

verification of a measuring instrument which has not been verified previously

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #2.15
    verification of a measuring instrument which has not been verified previously

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIML 2022. It may have been removed, renamed, or superseded by a different concept.
  2. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.
